2245430.name: Down With Fear
2245430.description:
Down With Fear: is a single-player survival horror game developed by a 1-Man Team, set in the 90s in a military hospital. Your goal is to overcome the enemys who are waiting there for you by hide from them, find items that reveal you new paths and by some enemys there is no other option but to run away to survive!

Features:

- The gameplay consists of solving puzzles hidden in the levels and finding items like keys or batteries to survive the journey through the military hospital!

- But beware there is no way to defend yourself except to hide or run away

- There can be found throughout the game notes / documents that accompany you through the story and give you tips on how to progress!
2245430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
